name: componentry-ripple-transition
title: Ripple Image Transition
author: Harsh Jadhav
description: Transitions between caller-provided images with a click-positioned refractive WebGL wave.

changes: Repointed copied dependencies; removed remote demo defaults and require caller images; bounded image count, duration, autoplay interval, DPR, and render size; added setup fallback, buffer validation, viewport and tab pausing, reduced-motion settling, inactive autoplay gating, and disabled-state focus behavior.
Repointed the utility import to the copied source-local dependency and made optional fallback props explicit for exact-optional TypeScript.

modifications.change: Repointed copied dependencies; removed remote demo defaults and require caller images; bounded image count, duration, autoplay interval, DPR, and render size; added setup fallback, buffer validation, viewport and tab pausing, reduced-motion settling, inactive autoplay gating, and disabled-state focus behavior.
modifications.reason: Ship the reusable transition without third-party runtime assets, unbounded GPU work, or hidden autoplay.

modifications.change: Repointed the utility import to the copied source-local dependency and made optional fallback props explicit for exact-optional TypeScript.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied support file installable beside the retained component.
